name: hn-mcp-server
description: MCP server for Hacker News — feeds, threads, users, and search via Firebase and Algolia APIs

HN_CONCURRENCY_LIMIT.title: Concurrency Limit
HN_CONCURRENCY_LIMIT.description: Max concurrent HTTP requests for batch item fetches (1–50).

MCP_LOG_LEVEL.title: Log Level
MCP_LOG_LEVEL.description: Minimum log level for output (debug, info, warn, error).
